'''âdh-ch-h''' ('''kadhachah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaporise|vaporise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaporise|vaporise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-ch-h
|-
! Lemma
| kadhachah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhachah|thidhachah]] || [[word:jidhachah|jidhachah]] || [[word:shidhachah|shidhachah]] || [[word:kidhachah|kidhachah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhachah|thuthudhachah]] || [[word:jujudhachah|jujudhachah]] || [[word:shushudhachah|shushudhachah]] || [[word:kukudhachah|kukudhachah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhachah|thudhachah]] || [[word:judhachah|judhachah]] || [[word:shudhachah|shudhachah]] || [[word:kudhachah|kudhachah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhachah|thudhachah]] || [[word:judhachah|judhachah]] || [[word:shudhachah|shudhachah]] || [[word:kudhachah|kudhachah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhachah|thedhachah]] || [[word:jedhachah|jedhachah]] || [[word:shedhachah|shedhachah]] || [[word:kedhachah|kedhachah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhachah|thothodhachah]] || [[word:jojodhachah|jojodhachah]] || [[word:shoshodhachah|shoshodhachah]] || [[word:kokodhachah|kokodhachah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhachah|thodhachah]] || [[word:jodhachah|jodhachah]] || [[word:shodhachah|shodhachah]] || [[word:kodhachah|kodhachah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhachah|thodhachah]] || [[word:jodhachah|jodhachah]] || [[word:shodhachah|shodhachah]] || [[word:kodhachah|kodhachah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhachah|thĂŠdhachah]] || [[word:jĂŠdhachah|jĂŠdhachah]] || [[word:shĂŠdhachah|shĂŠdhachah]] || [[word:kĂŠdhachah|kĂŠdhachah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhachah|thathadhachah]] || [[word:jajadhachah|jajadhachah]] || [[word:shashadhachah|shashadhachah]] || [[word:kakadhachah|kakadhachah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhachah|thadhachah]] || [[word:jadhachah|jadhachah]] || [[word:shadhachah|shadhachah]] || [[word:kadhachah|kadhachah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhachah|thadhachah]] || [[word:jadhachah|jadhachah]] || [[word:shadhachah|shadhachah]] || [[word:kadhachah|kadhachah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhachah|shadhachah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhachah|goshadhachah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhachah|gokishadhachah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhachahnĂŒ|shadhachahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachahnknĂŒ|goshadhachahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachahnĂŒ|gokishadhachahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhachahshĂ«|shadhachahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkshĂ«|goshadhachahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhachahshĂ«|gokishadhachahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachahro|shadhachahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkro|goshadhachahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachahro|gokishadhachahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachahmu|shadhachahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkmu|goshadhachahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachahmu|gokishadhachahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhachahsher|shadhachahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhachahnksher|goshadhachahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhachahsher|gokishadhachahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhachahng|shadhachahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkng|goshadhachahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhachahng|gokishadhachahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhachahya|shadhachahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkya|goshadhachahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhachahya|gokishadhachahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhachahyam|shadhachahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkyam|goshadhachahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhachahyam|gokishadhachahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhachahnĂŒshĂ«|shadhachahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhachahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhachahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhachahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhachahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachahnĂŒro|shadhachahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachahnknĂŒro|goshadhachahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachahnĂŒro|gokishadhachahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachahnĂŒmu|shadhachahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachahnknĂŒmu|goshadhachahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachahnĂŒmu|gokishadhachahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhachahshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhachahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhachahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhachahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachahshĂ«ro|shadhachahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkshĂ«ro|goshadhachahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachahshĂ«ro|gokishadhachahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachahshĂ«mu|shadhachahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkshĂ«mu|goshadhachahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachahshĂ«mu|gokishadhachahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhachahronĂŒ|shadhachahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkronĂŒ|goshadhachahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachahronĂŒ|gokishadhachahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhachahroshĂ«|shadhachahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkroshĂ«|goshadhachahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhachahroshĂ«|gokishadhachahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachahromu|shadhachahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkromu|goshadhachahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachahromu|gokishadhachahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhachahmunĂŒ|shadhachahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkmunĂŒ|goshadhachahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachahmunĂŒ|gokishadhachahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhachahmushĂ«|shadhachahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkmushĂ«|goshadhachahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhachahmushĂ«|gokishadhachahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachahmuro|shadhachahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachahnkmuro|goshadhachahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachahmuro|gokishadhachahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
